subject: Abomasnow, a large white yeti-like creature in a snowy mountain landscape
description: A tall, broad-shouldered yeti-like creature stands in a stark snowy landscape. The figure has a white, shaggy or layered body with a prominent round head, stubby dark features, and large arms at its sides. Snowflakes or ice particles drift around it. The background is white and grey — an open snowfield or mountainside with minimal detail, giving the scene a stark, isolated quality. The creature's stillness against the white expanse conveys a sense of cold solitude.
foreground: large white shaggy yeti-like creature standing still
background: stark white snowfield with minimal detail
